title: Spicy Smoked Haloumi Skillet
description: A simple and flavorful skillet dish featuring smoky haloumi cheese, smoky spices, and a hint of sweetness.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the halouba and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoky paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the haloumi and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the haloumi hot, garnished with additional halouba if desired.
